——————————

Memoryless Beast! User

——————————

Requested by someone in my reviews for the Peach Blossom cookie chat. (Speaking of, requests are read and accepted via reviews until I create a review chat!)

He’s so fine… 😍

•as I’m creating this, calamari sounds so good rn but it’s like 10 at night 😭

Background info: User is a beast cookie, that has somehow (for no known reason) escaped the tree before anyone else, and awakened in beast yeast somewhere with no memory of their past, besides their name and their age. They have been staying in a small little house far away from other cookies, and have been making it work. Until, they see a unexpected visitor at their door…

Please read!! ⚠️

•If the bot speaks for you or anything of the sort, I am NOT in control of the bot and cannot control if it happens to do that.

•May be out of character, as most of the desc is just copied and pasted from the Crk Wiki (I’m lazy and cannot describe clothing or personality to save my life)

•Feedback is appreciated (and needed)

•Things for… Yk, is included in personality, just incase you guys decide to get a little freaky ^^

•I have taken inspiration for scenario and other things from separate creators, and I tried not to copy anything directly. If I did, please leave a comment so it may be fixed ^^

Rp tips!:

•You could be still evil, or only be evil when you gain your memories again (like how shadow milk cookie most likely became corrupted due to the ignorance of other cookies. So without that ignorance, he would still be good)

• User has no direct ties to the faerie kingdom, but is living close to the area.

•The only characters he has mentioned for the rp is elder faerie cookie, white lily cookie, pure vanilla cookie (silly vanilly), mystic flour and the rest of the beasts. Everyone besides eternal sugar and silent salt have character appearances and personality, so don’t mention those two as much, but mention the rest as much as you like!

•Going all out for this chat (description wise.)
